export default "# Depth\r\n\r\n[_Link to project source_](https://github.com/nkooman/the-showcase/tree/master/src/projects/depth)\r\n\r\nThe inspiration for this project was a [post on Reddit from r/typography](https://www.reddit.com/r/typography/comments/ovw2gb/first_time_playing_with_type/).
